title: Chomelia bella
taxonomy: Chomelia bella is classified within the Apocynaceae family. This family is commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. Chomelia bella is also classified within the Apocynoideae subfamily. The plant is native to tropical regions and is a member of the Apocynaceae family. It belongs to the genus Chomelia.
